heading: Exception to certain disclosure restrictions
label: 6205 Exception to certain disclosure restrictions
text: , and sections 46(f) and 57b–2 of this title, shall not apply to prevent the Attorney General or the Commission from providing to a foreign antitrust authority antitrust evidence in accordance with an antitrust mutual assistance agreement in effect under this chapter and in accordance with the other requirements of this chapter.Section 1313 of this title
